title: scabiosa lucida subsp. stricta
intro: Scabiosa lucida subsp. stricta, also known as strict scabious, is a plant species of the genus Scabiosa, a group of flowering plants in the honeysuckle family. Traditionally, strict scabious has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues. Strict scabious can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile natural remedy for various ailments.
